subject: Every — How to ship an agentic product in 30 days
snippet: A practical playbook for solo founders building agent-native tools.
bodyHtml:
Ship an agent in 30 days

Anthropic released the Agent SDK 1.4 on April 22 with new memory primitives. For solo founders, this changes the time-to-MVP from 3 months to 3 weeks.

The core insight: agent-native UX is not chat. It's a thin shell around a long-running task. We profiled 12 indie founders shipping in this window — average revenue at day 60 was $4.7k MRR.

Concrete idea: domain-specific agent tools for legal, accounting, and clinical-notes verticals. The market clarity: SMB lawyers paying $99/mo for a Claude wrapper that drafts motions.

The next wave isn't AI products — it's AI shells around boring workflows.

Full piece | unsubscribe
